text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My research has been ongoing, and I've been
repeating this test for some time now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how it'll go this time. I can't keep
repeating the same failures.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing is certain, but I guess it's only natural
that us searchers of potential would have hope.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! Why shouldn't we? Let's hope for the
best results, Trainer!
